creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
root@xx:~ # gpart show da1
=>        34  1953525100  da1  GPT  (932G)
          34        2014       - free -  (1.0M)
        2048   838860800    1  linux-data  (400G)
.....

the da1 is a usb hard disk,I format it on the MS Windows 7,the first partition is NTFS.

when use in freebsd,gpart show the first partition is linux-data,which I can't find info in any docs,etc man gpart.

I think it is better to show ntfs type or unknown type?
